confidence_justification_reported: The analysis heavily leverages a robust, triangulated consensus of premier institutional research (IMF, SSGA, PGIM, J.P. Morgan, S&P Global) alongside exact 2026 macroeconomic data to deeply corroborate the specified scenario dynamics.
key_data_limitations_reported: Forward-looking capital market assumptions and expected returns vary significantly by institution and are highly sensitive to unpredictable geopolitical shocks not captured in standard baseline econometric models.

Private market historical return data inherently suffers from significant survivorship bias and appraisal-based return smoothing, potentially drastically understating the true underlying mark-to-market volatility during prolonged stagflationary periods.
